binary_metadata.file_type: a /bin/env sh script, ASCII text executable

apt_metadata.description:
Open-Source Phishing Toolkit
This package contains an open-source phishing toolkit designed for businesses
and penetration testers. It provides the ability to quickly and easily setup
and execute phishing engagements and security awareness training.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use gophish because ### gophish.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair gophish with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `gophish --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: ### gophish.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install gophish
Install with: sudo apt install gophish
